name: GolfSuites Lubbock
address: 6909 Marsha Sharp Fwy W, Lubbock, TX 79407
about: GolfSuites Lubbock is an indoor golf simulator and entertainment venue that provides a golf-centric social experience. The facility features advanced golf simulator technology, dining options, and event spaces. It caters to a wide range of patrons, from casual players to serious golfers, by offering hourly simulator rentals, food and beverage service, and opportunities for private events and group outings. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals with varying rates depending on the time of day, and there are options for parties, corporate events, and special dining promotions.
why_golfers_like_it: All-in-one entertainment with golf, dining, and event spaces
Flexible hourly pricing options and membership plans
Professional golf lessons available from top-rated pros
Spacious and well-equipped private event rooms

food_and_drink.notes: Full gourmet kitchen with options like juicy burgers, game-day nachos, smashburger meals, and 18-inch pizzas
Full bar with handcrafted cocktails, happy hour specials, and drink discounts

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. The venue offers a full menu of gourmet food and beverages, including a full bar and handcrafted cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes is not specified. Hourly bay rentals are available, so the time depends on the package selected and how many holes you wish to play within your rental period.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfSuites Lubbock is kid-friendly and promotes itself as a fun family outing, with activities and food options suitable for all ages.
